languages.text: "Как сделать имперца еще более жадным, спесивым и суетливым? Даровать ему титул Вольного Торговца! Данная экспозиция посвящена, вероятно, одному из самых примечательных образчиков этой любопытной прослойки имперского общества — Себериану фон Валанциусу, хитрому и наглому воришке, который угодил в ловушку в погоне за моими сокровищами".

traits.locale_text: "Как сделать имперца еще более жадным, спесивым и суетливым? Даровать ему титул Вольного Торговца! Данная экспозиция посвящена, вероятно, одному из самых примечательных образчиков этой любопытной прослойки имперского общества — Себериану фон Валанциусу, хитрому и наглому воришке, который угодил в ловушку в погоне за моими сокровищами".

languages.text: "How to make a human even more greedy, arrogant, and fussy? Grant him the title of Rogue Trader! This exhibit is dedicated to perhaps one of the most notable examples of this curious social stratum of the Imperium — Seberian von Valancius, the cunning and brazen thief who fell into a trap in pursuit of my treasures."
languages.original_text: "Как сделать имперца еще более жадным, спесивым и суетливым? Даровать ему титул Вольного Торговца! Данная экспозиция посвящена, вероятно, одному из самых примечательных образчиков этой любопытной прослойки имперского общества — Себериану фон Валанциусу, хитрому и наглому воришке, который угодил в ловушку в погоне за моими сокровищами".

This exhibit is dedicated to perhaps one of the most notable examples of this curious social stratum of the Imperium — Seberian von Valancius, the cunning and brazen thief who fell into a trap in pursuit of my treasures."

"How to make a human even more greedy, arrogant, and fussy? Grant him the title of Rogue Trader! This exhibit is dedicated to perhaps one of the most notable examples of this curious social stratum of the Imperium — Seberian von Valancius, the cunning and brazen thief who fell into a trap in pursuit of my treasures."

"How to make a human even more greedy, arrogant, and fussy? Grant him the title of Rogue Trader! This exhibit is dedicated to perhaps one of the most notable examples of this curious social stratum of the Imperium — Seberian von Valancius, the cunning and brazen thief who fell into a trap in pursuit of my treasures."

languages.text: «¿Cómo hacer que un humano sea más avaricioso, arrogante y exigente? ¡Con el cargo de Comerciante Independiente! Este expositor está dedicado a uno de los ejemplares más notables de este curioso estrato social del Imperium: Seberian von Valancius. Se trata del astuto y osado ladrón que cayó en una trampa al buscar mis tesoros».
languages.original_text: "How to make a human even more greedy, arrogant, and fussy? Grant him the title of Rogue Trader! This exhibit is dedicated to perhaps one of the most notable examples of this curious social stratum of the Imperium — Seberian von Valancius, the cunning and brazen thief who fell into a trap in pursuit of my treasures."

traits.locale_text: «¿Cómo hacer que un humano sea más avaricioso, arrogante y exigente? ¡Con el cargo de Comerciante Independiente! Este expositor está dedicado a uno de los ejemplares más notables de este curioso estrato social del Imperium: Seberian von Valancius. Se trata del astuto y osado ladrón que cayó en una trampa al buscar mis tesoros».

languages.text: “如何让一个人变得更贪婪、更傲慢、更难伺候？给他个行商浪人的头衔就行了！这件展品所呈现的，或许是帝国那独特社会阶层中最具代表性的人物——塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯。这个狡猾又胆大包天的窃贼，为了追逐我的珍藏，自己掉进了陷阱。”
languages.original_text: "How to make a human even more greedy, arrogant, and fussy? Grant him the title of Rogue Trader! This exhibit is dedicated to perhaps one of the most notable examples of this curious social stratum of the Imperium — Seberian von Valancius, the cunning and brazen thief who fell into a trap in pursuit of my treasures."

traits.locale_text: “如何让一个人变得更贪婪、更傲慢、更难伺候？给他个行商浪人的头衔就行了！这件展品所呈现的，或许是帝国那独特社会阶层中最具代表性的人物——塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯。这个狡猾又胆大包天的窃贼，为了追逐我的珍藏，自己掉进了陷阱。”

languages.text: « Comment rendre un être humain encore plus avide, arrogant et capricieux ? En lui accordant le titre de libre-marchand ! Cette représentation est dédiée à l'un des spécimens les plus remarquables de cette étrange caste de l'Imperium, j'ai nommé Seberian von Valancius, le voleur sans foi ni loi qui est tombé dans un piège en cherchant à s'emparer de mes trésors. »
languages.original_text: "How to make a human even more greedy, arrogant, and fussy? Grant him the title of Rogue Trader! This exhibit is dedicated to perhaps one of the most notable examples of this curious social stratum of the Imperium — Seberian von Valancius, the cunning and brazen thief who fell into a trap in pursuit of my treasures."

traits.locale_text: « Comment rendre un être humain encore plus avide, arrogant et capricieux ? En lui accordant le titre de libre-marchand ! Cette représentation est dédiée à l'un des spécimens les plus remarquables de cette étrange caste de l'Imperium, j'ai nommé Seberian von Valancius, le voleur sans foi ni loi qui est tombé dans un piège en cherchant à s'emparer de mes trésors. »

languages.text: "Bir insan nasıl daha açgözlü, kibirli ve mızmız hâle getirilir? Ona Hür Tacir ünvanı verilerek! Bu sergi, İmparatorluk'un bu ilginç sosyal tabakasının belki de en dikkate değer örneklerinden birine adanmıştır: Hazinelerimin peşindeyken tuzağa düşen kurnaz ve küstah hırsız Seberian von Valancius."
languages.original_text: "How to make a human even more greedy, arrogant, and fussy? Grant him the title of Rogue Trader! This exhibit is dedicated to perhaps one of the most notable examples of this curious social stratum of the Imperium — Seberian von Valancius, the cunning and brazen thief who fell into a trap in pursuit of my treasures."

traits.locale_text: "Bir insan nasıl daha açgözlü, kibirli ve mızmız hâle getirilir? Ona Hür Tacir ünvanı verilerek! Bu sergi, İmparatorluk'un bu ilginç sosyal tabakasının belki de en dikkate değer örneklerinden birine adanmıştır: Hazinelerimin peşindeyken tuzağa düşen kurnaz ve küstah hırsız Seberian von Valancius."

languages.text: 「人間をさらに貪欲で傲慢で神経質なようにする方法は？彼に「不正取引者」の称号を与えることだ！この展示は、帝国の奇妙な社会階層の最も顕著な例の一つである、私の宝物を追って罠にはまった狡猾で大胆な泥棒、シベリア・フォン・ヴァランキウスに捧げられている。」
languages.original_text: "How to make a human even more greedy, arrogant, and fussy? Grant him the title of Rogue Trader! This exhibit is dedicated to perhaps one of the most notable examples of this curious social stratum of the Imperium — Seberian von Valancius, the cunning and brazen thief who fell into a trap in pursuit of my treasures."

traits.locale_text: 「人間をさらに貪欲で傲慢で神経質なようにする方法は？彼に「不正取引者」の称号を与えることだ！この展示は、帝国の奇妙な社会階層の最も顕著な例の一つである、私の宝物を追って罠にはまった狡猾で大胆な泥棒、シベリア・フォン・ヴァランキウスに捧げられている。」

languages.text: "Wie macht man einen Menschen noch gieriger, arroganter und übereifriger? Indem man ihn zum Freihändler ernennt! Diese Ausstellung ist einem der vielleicht bemerkenswertesten Beispiele dieser seltsamen gesellschaftlichen Schicht des Imperiums gewidmet ... Seberian von Valancius, dem listigen und dreisten Dieb, der auf der Suche nach meinen Schätzen in eine Falle tappte."
languages.original_text: "How to make a human even more greedy, arrogant, and fussy? Grant him the title of Rogue Trader! This exhibit is dedicated to perhaps one of the most notable examples of this curious social stratum of the Imperium — Seberian von Valancius, the cunning and brazen thief who fell into a trap in pursuit of my treasures."
